# Copilot Instructions for Next.js with TypeScript and Tailwind CSS

This project is a Next.js application with TypeScript and Tailwind CSS configured.

## Project Setup
- Framework: Next.js
- Language: TypeScript
- Styling: Tailwind CSS
- Package Manager: npm

## Development Guidelines
- Follow Next.js best practices and conventions
- Use TypeScript for type safety
- Utilize Tailwind CSS for styling
- Keep components modular and reusable
